---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

What problem does this solve? Describe the use case clearly.

> Example: "When monitoring large group chats, I need to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, or any other context that helps explain the request.
